description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and practical usage, gauging the learner's ability to apply CSS techniques confidently on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that motivates further learning. The format is multiple‑choice, emphasizing quick recall and practical understanding.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, Modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), Responsive design, CSS preprocessors and tooling, Best practices for styling web interfaces
Audience: Web developers and designers with basic CSS experience who want to benchmark and improve their modern styling skills.
